## What this changes

A short summary of the change and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New provider
- [ ] Feature / enhancement
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## How I tested it

Describe how you verified the change (commands run, agents used).

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
- [ ] Spawns use array args (no `shell: true`, no shell interpolation of user input)
